_notes: Source: tk-soft-observation (custom). Target: us-core-observation-lab (US Core). Source has stricter effective[x] cardinality, stricter performer, category slicing, and custom extensions. Target adds new error constraints and widens types.

drifts.description: Source constraints removed: [tk-obs-1 (error: Observation must have a value or dataAbsentReason), tk-obs-2 (error: Vital signs must have a numeric value)]. No equivalent in target.
New error constraint added in target: us-core-2 (error: If there is no component or hasMember element then either a value[x] or a data absent reason must be present). Not in source.
Extension deviceUsed[0..1 mustSupport=true] present in source is removed in target (us-core-observation-lab does not define this extension).
Extension bodyPosition[0..1 mustSupport=true] present in source is removed in target.
Extension observationMethod[0..1 mustSupport=true] present in source is removed in target.
MustSupport added on status in target (status inherits R4 min=1, now explicitly ms=true in us-core-observation-lab).
Source category:vitalSigns[0..1 ms=false] slice removed in target. Target replaces source slicing with a different slice (us-core).
Source category:laboratory[0..1 ms=false] slice removed in target. Target uses a different mandatory slice (us-core).
New mandatory slice 'us-core' added in target: [1..1 ms=true required binding: us-core-clinical-result-observation-category]. No equivalent in source.
MustSupport added on new mandatory slice 'us-core' (min=1, conformance-critical in target).
Binding changed: source extensible(https://tk-soft.example.com/fhir/ValueSet/observation-code) → target extensible(us-core-laboratory-test-codes). Different value sets, same strength.
code.coding cardinality relaxed from [1..*] to [0..*] and MustSupport removed. Source requires at least one coding; target inherits R4 base with no coding constraint.
code.coding.system cardinality relaxed from [1..1 ms=true] to [0..1 ms=false]. Target does not constrain coding.system.
code.coding.code cardinality relaxed from [1..1 ms=true] to [0..1 ms=false]. Target does not constrain coding.code.
Reference target changed: source constrains to tk-soft/Patient; target constrains to us-core-patient.
MustSupport removed on encounter (source ms=true; target inherits R4 base with no encounter constraint, ms=false).
Reference target removed in target: source constrains encounter to tk-soft/Encounter; target has no encounter target profile constraint.
Cardinality relaxed: source [1..1] → target [0..1]. Source requires effective[x]; target makes it optional (MustSupport preserved in target).
Types widened: source allows [dateTime, Period]; target (R4 base snapshot) allows [dateTime, Period, Timing, instant]. Two additional types available in target.
New error constraint added in target: us-core-1 (error: Datetime must be at least to day). Not present in source.
Cardinality relaxed: source [1..*] → target [0..*]. Source requires performer; target makes it optional.
MustSupport removed on performer (source ms=true; target ms=false, min=0).

Reference target changed: source constrains to [tk-soft/Practitioner, tk-soft/Organization]; target uses R4 base generic reference targets (no target profile constraint in us-core-observation-lab differential).

Types widened: source allows [Quantity, CodeableConcept, string]; target allows [Quantity, CodeableConcept, string, boolean, integer, Range, Ratio, SampledData, time, dateTime, Period]. Eight additional types in target.
New error constraint added in target: us-core-3 (error: SHALL use UCUM for coded quantity units). Not in source.
New warning constraint added in target: us-core-4 (warning: SHOULD use SNOMED CT for coded Results). Not in source.
MustSupport removed on interpretation (source ms=true; target ms=false, inherits R4 base).
Binding strength weakened: source extensible(http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/body-site) → target example(body-site VS). Strength weakened from extensible to example.

Binding changed: source extensible(https://tk-soft.example.com/fhir/ValueSet/observation-method) → target example(observation-methods VS). Different value set and strength weakened from extensible to example.
MustSupport added on specimen in target (source has no specimen constraint; target has ms=true on optional specimen element).
Reference target constrained in target: source has no specimen constraint; target constrains to us-core-specimen.
MustSupport removed on referenceRange (source ms=true; target ms=false, inherits R4 base).
MustSupport removed on referenceRange.low (source ms=true; target not constrained).
MustSupport removed on referenceRange.high (source ms=true; target not constrained).
MustSupport removed on referenceRange.type (source ms=true; target ms=false, preferred binding in R4 base snapshot).
MustSupport removed on component (source ms=true; target ms=false).
MustSupport removed on component.code (source ms=true; target not constrained, ms=false).
MustSupport removed on component.value[x] (source ms=true; target not constrained, ms=false).
USCDI annotation extension added to category:us-core in target (USCDI v1+ data element annotation).
USCDI annotation extension added to code in target.
USCDI annotation extension added to value[x] in target.
USCDI annotation extension added to specimen in target.

Types widened on component.value[x]: source restricts to [Quantity, CodeableConcept, string]; target (R4 base) allows [Quantity, CodeableConcept, string, boolean, integer, Range, Ratio, SampledData, time, dateTime, Period]. Eight additional types available in target.
